title: Clinical Characteristics and Outcomes of COVID-19 Cohort Patients in Daegu Metropolitan City Outbreak in 2020.
author: Kim SW Kim SM Kim YK Kim JY Lee YM Kim BO Hwangbo S Park T
content:
S-EPMC7781854 PMC7781854 Clinical Characteristics and Outcomes of COVID-19 Cohort Patients in Daegu Metropolitan City Outbreak in 2020.

Background

A coronavirus disease 2019 (COVID-19) outbreak started in February 2020 and was controlled at the end of March 2020 in Daegu, the epicenter
